meta.title: Labs Cannabis — Premium Cannabis Dispensary in Pattaya
meta.description: Licensed medical cannabis shop in South Pattaya. Curated strains, on-site medical card assistance. Walk in, no appointment needed. 5 min from Walking Street.
meta.ogDescription: Licensed medical cannabis dispensary in South Pattaya. Curated selection of premium strains. Walk in — we handle everything on the spot.

hero.title: Curated cannabis, handpicked for you

noPrescription.title: No prescription? We've got you.
noPrescription.subtitle: Thailand requires a medical card — but don't worry, we handle everything on the spot. Just walk in.
noPrescription.step1Desc: No appointment needed. Just come to the shop any time we're open.
noPrescription.step2Desc: Quick form on your phone — takes 2 minutes. Our staff will guide you through every step.
noPrescription.step3Desc: Pick your strain, pay, and enjoy. That's it.

footer.disclaimer: For adults 20+ only. Medical cannabis is legal in Thailand under the regulated medical framework. A medical consultation is required before purchase. Labs Cannabis operates under a valid Thai medical cannabis license.
